_comment: Fixtures for the Lens red-team suite (CHK-7.1c). Offline: mock evidence docs + pasted-panel fixtures. NO network. The mock model + mock provider in scripts/test-lens.mjs drive the REAL engine over these.

docs.title: Apigenin for insomnia: a randomized placebo-controlled trial
docs.abstractText: In a randomized placebo-controlled trial, apigenin reduced sleep onset latency by 7 minutes compared with placebo. No effect on total sleep time was observed. Adverse events were mild and transient.

docs.title: A systematic review of botanical sleep aids
docs.abstractText: Across the included trials the evidence for most botanical sleep aids was of low quality and results were inconsistent, with small samples and short follow-up.
